content.text: in src/pages/OrganizationApplication/FinancialAuthority/AcceptanceForm/PlaidIdentityButton.tsx I'm afraid the button will re-render causing the plaid modal to open multiple times. How can I memoize or refactor this such that when the button is clicked, we get an identity token and only open the modal once. Basically we need to wait until we have a valid token, then when we do, don't re-open the modal again until the user has finished and clicks the button again.

payload.message: in src/pages/OrganizationApplication/FinancialAuthority/AcceptanceForm/PlaidIdentityButton.tsx I'm afraid the button will re-render causing the plaid modal to open multiple times. How can I memoize or refactor this such that when the button is clicked, we get an identity token and only open the modal once. Basically we need to wait until we have a valid token, then when we do, don't re-open the modal again until the user has finished and clicks the button again.

payload.name: apply_patch

payload.message:
Added a guard so Plaid opens only once per click after the token is ready: `PlaidFormTrigger` now waits for `ready` and `token` from `usePlaidIdv` and uses a `hasOpenedRef` to block re-opening on re-renders. (`src/pages/OrganizationApplication/FinancialAuthority/AcceptanceForm/PlaidIdentityButton.tsx`)

Next steps: 1) Manually click the button to confirm the modal opens once per attempt and doesn’t re-trigger on rerenders; 2) Verify success/exit flows still reset the launch state.

content.text:
Added a guard so Plaid opens only once per click after the token is ready: `PlaidFormTrigger` now waits for `ready` and `token` from `usePlaidIdv` and uses a `hasOpenedRef` to block re-opening on re-renders. (`src/pages/OrganizationApplication/FinancialAuthority/AcceptanceForm/PlaidIdentityButton.tsx`)

Next steps: 1) Manually click the button to confirm the modal opens once per attempt and doesn’t re-trigger on rerenders; 2) Verify success/exit flows still reset the launch state.
